title: Matt Pocock’s Agentic Engineering Workflow (just copy him)
summary: David Ondrej reviews Matt Pocock's agentic engineering workflow in a YouTube video. The content focuses on practical approaches to AI-assisted coding and is sponsored by SerpApi.
writeup: David Ondrej walks through Matt Pocock's agentic engineering workflow, breaking down a practical approach to AI-assisted coding. The video centers on prompt engineering as applied to development tasks, presenting the workflow as a model to replicate. The segment is sponsored by SerpApi.
